summary: Optional killshots/predictions tab lead sentence citing the 0-of-6-tagged prospective_confirmed result
detail: The dome author's own claim taxonomy (methodology.json) and his partial public classification (claim_index.json) now show that of the 6 unique WIN visible labels he has so far tagged, ZERO are in the prospective_confirmed class. The remaining 63 of the 69 confirmed WINs are unclassified as of 2026-04-17. EXP-170 already enumerates the per-WIN tags in the Timestamp Error tab; this proposal is for an OPTIONAL aggregate one-liner suitable for the Kill-Shots tab lead paragraph or Predictions tab header. Proposed sentence: "As of 2026-04-17 the dome author has begun classifying his claims under his own five-class taxonomy; only six of the sixty-nine confirmed WINs have been tagged so far, and not one of those six sits in the prospective_confirmed class he himself reserves for genuine forecasts." Decision is stylistic — the per-WIN enumeration in EXP-170 is already more readable. Recommend: decider read monitor/analysis/analysis-20260417-1948-taxonomy-count.json and decide whether to patch. No expansion required.
